# Tags

- ✅ Parity: 18
- ☑️ Mock: 1
- Unsupported: 11
- **Total:** 30

| Tag           |     | By       | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ------------- | --- | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `assign`      | ✅  | LiquidJS | Creates a new variable.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `break`       | ✅  | LiquidJS | Stops a [`for` loop](/docs/api/liquid/tags/for) from iterating.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `capture`     | ✅  | LiquidJS | Creates a new variable with a string value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `case`        | ✅  | LiquidJS | Renders a specific expression depending on the value of a specific variable.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `comment`     | ✅  | LiquidJS | Prevents an expression from being rendered or output.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `content_for` |     |          | Creates a designated area in your [theme](https://shopify.dev/themes/architecture) where blocks can be rendered.                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `continue`    | ✅  | LiquidJS | Causes a [`for` loop](/docs/api/liquid/tags/for) to skip to the next iteration.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `cycle`       | ✅  | LiquidJS | Loops through a group of strings and outputs them one at a time for each iteration of a [`for` loop](/docs/api/liquid/tags/for).                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `decrement`   | ✅  | LiquidJS | Creates a new variable, with a default value of -1, that's decreased by 1 with each subsequent call. &gt; Caution: &gt; Predefined Liquid objects can be overridden by variables with the same name. &gt; To make sure that you can access all Liquid objects, make sure that your variable name doesn't match a predefined object's name. |
| `doc`         |     |          | Documents template elements with annotations.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `echo`        | ✅  | LiquidJS | Outputs an expression.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `else`        |     |          | Allows you to specify a default expression to execute when no other condition is met.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `else`        |     |          | Allows you to specify a default expression to execute when a [`for` loop](/docs/api/liquid/tags/for) has zero length.                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `for`         | ✅  | LiquidJS | Renders an expression for every item in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `form`        |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;form&gt;` tag, including any required `&lt;input&gt;` tags to submit the form to a specific endpoint.                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `if`          | ✅  | LiquidJS | Renders an expression if a specific condition is `true`.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `increment`   | ✅  | LiquidJS | Creates a new variable, with a default value of 0, that's increased by 1 with each subsequent call. &gt; Caution: &gt; Predefined Liquid objects can be overridden by variables with the same name. &gt; To make sure that you can access all Liquid objects, make sure that your variable name doesn't match a predefined object's name.  |
| `javascript`  |     |          | JavaScript code included in [section](/storefronts/themes/architecture/sections), [block](/storefronts/themes/architecture/blocks) and [snippet](/storefronts/themes/architecture/snippets) files.                                                                                                                                         |
| `layout`      | ✅  | LiquidJS | Specify which [layout](/themes/architecture/layouts) to use.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `liquid`      | ✅  | LiquidJS | Allows you to have a block of Liquid without delimeters on each tag.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `paginate`    |     |          | Splits an array's items across multiple pages.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `raw`         | ✅  | LiquidJS | Outputs any Liquid code as text instead of rendering it.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `render`      | ✅  | LiquidJS | Renders a [snippet](/themes/architecture/snippets) or [app block](/themes/architecture/sections/section-schema#render-app-blocks).                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `schema`      | ☑️  | Assay    | Section and block settings JSON. Silently ignored.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `section`     |     |          | Renders a [section](/themes/architecture/sections).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `sections`    |     |          | Renders a [section group](/themes/architecture/section-groups).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `style`       |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;style&gt;` tag with an attribute of `data-shopify`.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `stylesheet`  |     |          | CSS styles included in [section](/storefronts/themes/architecture/sections), [block](/storefronts/themes/architecture/blocks), and [snippet](/storefronts/themes/architecture/snippets) files.                                                                                                                                             |
| `tablerow`    | ✅  | LiquidJS | Generates HTML table rows for every item in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `unless`      | ✅  | LiquidJS | Renders an expression unless a specific condition is `true`.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |

## Deprecated

| Tag       |     | By       | Description                                         |
| --------- | --- | -------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
